# CWE-201 negative: sensitive fields omitted from response
lang: go
file: CWE-201-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

type userRecord struct {
	Username string `json:"username"`
	Email    string `json:"email"`
	APIKey   string `json:"api_key"`
}

type publicUser struct {
	Username string `json:"username"`
	Email    string `json:"email"`
}

// CWE-201 Insertion of Sensitive Information Into Sent Data (mitigated)
func FetchUser(c *gin.Context, store map[string]userRecord) {
	id := c.Param("id")
	record, ok := store[id]
	if !ok {
		c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "missing"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, publicUser{Username: record.Username, Email: record.Email})
}
